activities_projects.title: Comparing Conductors
activities_projects.objective: Compare heat conduction rates of different metals
steps: Heat one end of each metal rod over a candle
Place wax drops on the other ends
Time how long it takes for each wax to melt
Compare conduction rates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Differentiates conductors by heat conduction rate
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy in measurement and comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Observing Convection Currents
steps: Fill a beaker with water and heat gently from one side
Add a drop of food color at different heights
Observe and sketch the convection currents
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands movement of heat via convection
activities_projects.evaluation: Sketch clarity and correct reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Solar Radiation Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Compare heat absorption on different surfaces
steps: Place equal thermometers on black, white, and silver paper in sunlight
Measure temperatures every 5 minutes for 20 minutes
Analyze which surface absorbs the most heat
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Relates surface color and material to radiation absorption
activities_projects.evaluation: Data table and interpretation accuracy (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Insulation Efficiency Test
materials: Cups made of plastic, glass, and foam
steps: Pour equal hot water into all cups
Record initial temperature
Measure temperature every 5 minutes for 20 minutes
Compare heat loss
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Evaluates and ranks insulators by performance
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct conclusion based on measurements (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Heat Transfer in Air vs Water
activities_projects.objective: Compare convection in air and water
steps: Place incense stick in air jar and food color in water jar
Heat both jars from one side
Observe movement of smoke in air and color in water
Compare convection currents
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands differences in heat transfer between air and water

activities_projects.title: Measuring Thermal Conductivity
activities_projects.objective: Quantify how fast heat passes through materials
steps: Heat one end of each rod
Measure temperature at the other end every 30 seconds
Record time to reach 40°C
Compare conductivity
activities_projects.evaluation: Accurate data collection and comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Effect of Surface Area on Radiation
activities_projects.objective: Investigate how area affects heat absorption
steps: Wrap containers with black paper of different sizes
Pour equal hot water
Record temperature after 10 minutes
Analyze effect of exposed area
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands how surface area impacts heat transfer by radiation

activities_projects.title: Simulating Convection in Air
activities_projects.objective: Observe convection currents in a closed system
steps: Light incense stick inside glass box
Heat one side with lamp/candle
Observe smoke movement indicating convection patterns
Sketch the currents
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Visualizes air convection in enclosed spaces
activities_projects.evaluation: Observation accuracy and sketch quality (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparing Insulation Methods
steps: Wrap hot water cup with different insulating materials separately
Measure temperature after 15 minutes
Rank materials by effectiveness
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of measurements and conclusions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Create a Heat Transfer Data Quiz
steps: Prepare five questions based on conduction, convection, and radiation experiments
Exchange with a friend and solve
Discuss reasoning for answers
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of questions, correctness, and reasoning (10 marks)
